data.name: checkout.session.completed
data.description: Payment was confirmed. The subscription is now active and the invoice is finalized.

data.name: checkout.session.expired
data.description: The Checkout Session timed out without a payment being made. All draft records have been cleaned up.

data.name: checkout.session.failed
data.description: Payment failed or the provider cancelled the payment link.

data.name: checkout.session.initiated
data.description: A Checkout Session was created and a payment URL was returned to the customer.

data.name: credit_note.created
data.description: Fired when a credit note is created

data.name: credit_note.updated
data.description: Fired when a credit note is updated

data.name: customer.created
data.description: Fired when a new customer is created

data.name: customer.deleted
data.description: Fired when a customer is deleted

data.name: customer.updated
data.description: Fired when customer information is updated

data.name: entitlement.created
data.description: Fired when a new entitlement is created

data.name: entitlement.deleted
data.description: Fired when an entitlement is deleted

data.name: entitlement.updated
data.description: Fired when an entitlement is updated

data.name: entitlement.grant.exhausted
data.description: Fired when a customer's entitlement grant is fully consumed (usage reached the grant's quota for the current window)

data.name: feature.created
data.description: Fired when a new feature is created

data.name: feature.deleted
data.description: Fired when a feature is deleted

data.name: feature.updated
data.description: Fired when a feature is updated

data.name: feature.wallet_balance.alert
data.description: Triggered when a feature's wallet balance crosses an alert threshold (critical, warning, or info)

data.name: invoice.communication.triggered
data.description: Fired when an invoice communication is triggered

data.name: invoice.create.drafted
data.description: Fired when a new invoice is created in draft state

data.name: invoice.payment.overdue
data.description: Fired when payment of an invoice is overdue

data.name: invoice.update
data.description: Fired when an update is made to an invoice

data.name: invoice.update.finalized
data.description: Fired when an invoice is finalized and ready for payment

data.name: invoice.update.payment
data.description: Fired when a payment is recorded on an invoice

data.name: invoice.update.voided
data.description: Fired when an invoice is voided

data.name: payment.created
data.description: Fired when a new payment is created

data.name: payment.failed
data.description: Fired when a payment attempt fails

data.name: payment.pending
data.description: Fired when a payment is awaiting processing

data.name: payment.success
data.description: Fired when a payment is successful

data.name: payment.updated
data.description: Fired when payment details are updated

data.name: subscription.activated
data.description: Whenever a subscription moves from incomplete state to active state

data.name: subscription.cancelled
data.description: Fired when a subscription is cancelled

data.name: subscription.created
data.description: Fired when a new subscription is created

data.name: subscription.group_spend.threshold_reached
data.description: Fired when a feature group's total metered spend on a subscription crosses an alert threshold (critical, warning, or info) for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.group_spend.threshold_recovered
data.description: Fired when a feature group's total metered spend on a subscription falls back below all configured alert thresholds for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.line_item_spend.threshold_reached
data.description: Fired when a subscription line item's metered spend crosses an alert threshold (critical, warning, or info) for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.line_item_spend.threshold_recovered
data.description: Fired when a subscription line item's metered spend falls back below all configured alert thresholds for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.paused
data.description: Fired when a subscription is paused

data.name: subscription.renewal.due
data.description: Fired when a subscription is 2400 hours from period end

data.name: subscription.resumed
data.description: Fired when a paused subscription is resumed

data.name: subscription.spend.threshold_reached
data.description: Fired when a subscription's total metered spend crosses an alert threshold (critical, warning, or info) for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.spend.threshold_recovered
data.description: Fired when a subscription's total metered spend falls back below all configured alert thresholds for the current billing period

data.name: subscription.updated
data.description: Fired when a subscription is updated

data.name: wallet.created
data.description: Fired when a new wallet is created

data.name: wallet.credit_balance.dropped
data.description: When current balance in wallet falls below the defined threshold

data.name: wallet.credit_balance.recovered
data.description: When current balance in wallet rises above the defined threshold

data.name: wallet.ongoing_balance.dropped
data.description: When real-time balance in wallet falls below the defined threshold

data.name: wallet.ongoing_balance.recovered
data.description: When real-time balance in wallet rises above the defined threshold

data.name: wallet.terminated
data.description: Fired when a wallet is terminated

data.name: wallet.transaction.created
data.description: Fired when a new wallet transaction is created

data.name: wallet.transaction.updated
data.description: Fired when an existing wallet transaction is updated

data.name: wallet.ongoing_balance.updated
data.description: Fired when a wallet's ongoing (real-time) balance changes

data.name: wallet.updated
data.description: Fired when wallet details are updated
